title: [FIRRTL] update parser to handle subcircuits
body:
This updates the firrtl parser to handle subcircuits. In SFC, `SignalDriverAnnotation` and `ModuleReplacementAnnotation` use a special subcircuit format. subcircuits consist of three files
- `circuit.fir` the firrtl for the subcircuit. for `SignalDriverAnnotation` this is the signal driving logic, for `ModuleReplacementAnnotation` this is the replacement module
- `annotations.json` these are annotations that are associated with just the subcircuit
- `subCircuit.json` this will contain a single annotation, either `SignalDriverAnnotation` or `ModuleReplacementAnnotation`. these annotations need to scatter attributes to both the main circuit and the subcircuit

This PR adds a `--subcircuit-dir` option to `firtool`. This option specifies a directory to search for subcircuits. The parser will search for subdirectories that contain the three files and import them. subcircuits are parsed separately by a new parser instance and then their modules are merged with the main circuit. `scatterCustomMultiCircuitAnnotations` will handle scattering of `SignalDriverAnnotation` and `ModuleReplacementAnnotation`.
